scorecard.title: Welsh Fire (Women) vs Southern Brave (Women)
scorecard.subtitle: Match 21
scorecard.umpires: Julia Jarvis (England), Mark Newell (England), Graham Lloyd (England, TV)

batsmen.name: Sophia Dunkley
batsmen.how_out: c RM Southby b TC Coleman

dismissal_commentary.commentary: Tilly Corteen Coleman to Sophia Dunkley, no run, Caught out!! off break ball good length on the off stump,  Sophia Dunkley hangs in the crease to take the gamble with cut towards slip,  edged!! and expertly caught by Rhianna Southby. Leading to a soft dismissal.
dismissal_commentary.text: Caught out!! off break ball good length on the off stump,  Sophia Dunkley hangs in the crease to take the gamble with cut towards slip,  edged!! and expertly caught by Rhianna Southby. Leading to a soft dismissal.

dismissal_commentary.commentary: Sophie Devine to Hayley Matthews, no run, Out LBW !! fast ball,  full length,  on the stumps,  Hayley Matthews hangs in the crease to attempt flick shot,  but fails to make a contact with the ball,  it hits the pad,  Sophie Devine appeals for an LBW,  which the umpire eventually gives,  resulting in Hayley Matthews's dismissal.
dismissal_commentary.text: Out LBW !! fast ball,  full length,  on the stumps,  Hayley Matthews hangs in the crease to attempt flick shot,  but fails to make a contact with the ball,  it hits the pad,  Sophie Devine appeals for an LBW,  which the umpire eventually gives,  resulting in Hayley Matthews's dismissal.

batsmen.name: Tammy Beaumont
batsmen.how_out: c ME Bouchier b LK Bell

dismissal_commentary.commentary: Lauren Bell to Tammy Beaumont, no run, Caught out !! fast ball,  good length,  on the off stump,  Tammy Beaumont hangs in the crease,  tries a high-risk shot towards mid on,  but the ball finds safe hands of Maia Bouchier,  who makes no mistake in taking the catch. Tammy Beaumont is out.
dismissal_commentary.text: Caught out !! fast ball,  good length,  on the off stump,  Tammy Beaumont hangs in the crease,  tries a high-risk shot towards mid on,  but the ball finds safe hands of Maia Bouchier,  who makes no mistake in taking the catch. Tammy Beaumont is out.

batsmen.name: Jess Jonassen
batsmen.how_out: c L Wolvaardt b SFM Devine

dismissal_commentary.commentary: Sophie Devine to Jess Jonassen, no run, Caught out !! fast ball,  good length,  on the stumps,  Jess Jonassen hangs in the crease,  takes a big risk by attempting pull towards deep square leg,  but unfortunately,  the ball flies towards Laura Wolvaardt,  who displays excellent fielding skills to complete the catch,  resulting in the dismissal of Jess Jonassen.
dismissal_commentary.text: Caught out !! fast ball,  good length,  on the stumps,  Jess Jonassen hangs in the crease,  takes a big risk by attempting pull towards deep square leg,  but unfortunately,  the ball flies towards Laura Wolvaardt,  who displays excellent fielding skills to complete the catch,  resulting in the dismissal of Jess Jonassen.

dismissal_commentary.commentary: Lauren Bell to Sarah Bryce, no run, Bowled out !! leg cutter,  full length,  on the stumps,  Sarah Bryce hangs in the crease,  tries to take on the bowler but fails to get the timing right. The ball goes past the bat and crashes into the stumps,  and the batter is bowled out in disappointing fashion.
dismissal_commentary.text: Bowled out !! leg cutter,  full length,  on the stumps,  Sarah Bryce hangs in the crease,  tries to take on the bowler but fails to get the timing right. The ball goes past the bat and crashes into the stumps,  and the batter is bowled out in disappointing fashion.

batsmen.name: Katie George
batsmen.how_out: st RM Southby b CL Tryon

dismissal_commentary.commentary: Chloe Tryon to Katie George, no run, Stumped out !! arm ball,  yorker on the stumps,  Katie George hangs in the crease,  tries to slam it,  but Katie George fails to make contact with the ball,  and Rhianna Southby completes the stumping to send Katie George back to the dressing room.
dismissal_commentary.text: Stumped out !! arm ball,  yorker on the stumps,  Katie George hangs in the crease,  tries to slam it,  but Katie George fails to make contact with the ball,  and Rhianna Southby completes the stumping to send Katie George back to the dressing room.

commentaries.commentary: Freya Davies to Mady Villiers, 1 run, Run out !! fast ball,  good length,  on the off stump,  Mady Villiers hangs in the crease,  slams it towards deep cover and sets off for a run,  but it was a suicidal one. Georgia Davis collects the ball and throws it toward the stumps,  Sarah Bryce takes the bails off,  Mady Villiers was miles away from the crease. Spectacular Run out!!
